topics.title_hint: Roblox Weekend Events Lineup (Apr 23–25): What's Live RN
topics.angle: Forward-looking weekly preview of upcoming live events, creator streams, and in-game festivals this weekend. Different from 4/21 Easter recap — focuses on NEW events starting this Thursday through Sunday.

topics.title_hint: This New Ghibli-Style Roblox Game Is Pure Magic
topics.angle: Review of the trending anime/Ghibli-style Roblox game (from RSS). Focuses on visuals, chill vibes, exploration — totally different from Grow a Garden / PS5 reviews already covered.

topics.title_hint: Make Your Roblox Character DOUBLE JUMP: Animation Editor Tips 2026
topics.angle: Hands-on guide for young builders — how to rig custom characters, fix common Animation Editor glitches, and add cool moves like double jump. Directly inspired by RSS devforum posts. No AI Studio talk — pure animation craft.

topics.title_hint: Top 5 Wildest Roblox Records Broken in April 2026
topics.angle: Weekly roundup/ranking of record-breaking moments: concurrent players, speedruns, biggest obby completions, trade values. Builds on 4/19 and 4/21 but as a curated TOP-5 listicle format (not news), covering the whole month's highlights.

topics.title_hint: Dad's Corner: 3 Survival Hacks That Saved Me in 99 Nights
topics.angle: Dad shares practical survival lifehacks from his 99 Nights in the Forest playthrough — funny, fatherly tips like crafting priorities, night shelter spots, and teaming up with kids. Shifts from 'update hype' (4/17, 4/19, 4/21, 4/22) to actionable dad-gamer wisdom.
